testimonials.title: Client reviews
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people training with personalized coaching — online and in person.
testimonials.featuredTitle: 🌿 Synthesis — My Life with Functional Health (2020 → 2026)
testimonials.featuredContent:
Since the pandemic, when I began applying the Life Up methodology, my life went through a profound transformation. At 59, I live with a biological age of 30, a direct result of a consistent and intelligent functional routine.

I gained vitality, vigor, and daily energy. My body works with precision: aligned body fat percentage, high mobility, preserved agility, light joints, clear mind. For years I haven't known what it is to be sick — my immune system responds like someone much younger.

Functional health reorganized my body from within: regulated sleep, intelligent movement, functional nutrition, clear purpose, conscious breathing, and adjusted ecosystem. This put me on a solid path to old age with autonomy, strength, disposition, and active longevity.

Today I'm walking toward 60 with the real feeling of living my 30s again — only with wisdom, awareness, and true health.

marise.name: Marise Cicci
marise.content:
I've always enjoyed exercising — I do weight training, functional training, pilates… Now, at 63, I felt that having a plan aligned with exercise, nutrition, and quality of life would be wonderful!

That's when I reached out online to personal trainer Michel, who has been guiding me with monthly workouts. Through the app I can access each exercise demonstration and how many sets to do. Whenever I need to ask questions, I get an immediate response. First we fill out a form, take measurements and photos so we can compare and see satisfying results over time.

It's helping me stay focused, improve my sleep quality, build muscle, and learn about nutrition. I recommend it! This MFIT Personal method really helps us even from a distance, keeping me motivated and confident I'll reach my goals!

vitorSabrina.name: Vitor and Sabrina
vitorSabrina.imageAlt: Vitor and Sabrina at the gym
vitorSabrina.content:
We're Vitor and Sabrina, a couple in our mid-to-late 40s who decided to take our health, fitness, and quality of life seriously — and Michel has been a key part of this transformation. Since we started training with him, we've felt firsthand the difference of having an extremely dedicated, attentive professional committed to our goals, respecting our limitations and routine while encouraging us to go a little further each time.

In my case (Vitor), Michel has helped me a lot with back pain, adjusting workouts, posture, specific exercises, and always making sure movements are adapted so I can progress without getting hurt. Gradually, I've noticed improvements in strength, mobility, and especially less pain — something that directly impacts my daily life, work, and well-being. He patiently explains why each exercise matters, talks about heart rate, sleep, recovery, and builds workouts that truly fit my reality.

For Sabrina, who has always enjoyed physical activity and never struggled to stay committed, Michel added even more structure. He organized her dedication into well-thought-out plans aligned with her goals, respecting her pace while bringing variety and the right level of challenge. She channeled her existing motivation into safe, consistent progress with proper technique.

Another big difference is how dynamic and fun Michel's classes are, especially spinning. He curates the music, cadence, intensity variations, and creates a welcoming group atmosphere where everyone feels comfortable regardless of fitness level. We leave class sweaty and tired, but laughing, with a sense of accomplishment and eager to come back.

Beyond the technical side, Michel inspires us to care for other aspects of health: sleep, nutrition, routine, balance between body, mind, and spirit. He shares articles, challenges, and explanations of how small daily habits affect weight, mood, and energy. It's not just a random workout — it's fuller support where we feel he truly cares about our progress and our story.

As a couple, training with Michel strengthened our commitment to a healthy lifestyle. He understands our dynamic, respects our schedules, jokes with us, pushes us when needed, and celebrates every win, no matter how small. Today we can say with confidence that Michel isn't just our personal trainer — he's a partner on this journey, helping us care for our health, self-esteem, and life together.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Michel Eduardo's story, mission, and Functional Health approach in Canada.
about.title: About me

history.title: My story
history.p1: I'm Michel Eduardo, a professional dedicated to Functional Health with a focus on quality of life, prevention, and healthy aging.
history.p2: Throughout my journey, I've supported women over 40, seniors, and families seeking more energy, autonomy, and well-being — not just quick fixes, but a fuller life.
history.p3: My experience taught me that every person has a unique story. That's why my work is to listen, welcome, and build personalized paths.

mission.title: My mission
mission.description: Empower people to care for themselves with awareness, kindness, and consistency — turning knowledge into lasting habits.

vision.title: My vision of Functional Health
vision.description: I believe health is the ability to live with vitality, purpose, and connection. It's not about perfection, but sustainable balance between body, mind, and environment.

differentials.title: What sets me apart
differentials.item3: Focus on prevention and healthy longevity
differentials.item4: Realistic plans adapted to your routine
differentials.item5: Care in Portuguese and English in Canada

functionalHealth.metaTitle: Functional Health | What it is and its pillars
functionalHealth.metaDescription: Learn what Functional Health is and how pillars like movement, sleep, nutrition, and more impact your quality of life.
functionalHealth.title: What is Functional Health?
functionalHealth.intro: Functional Health goes beyond treating isolated symptoms. It identifies and balances root causes of imbalance, integrating body, mind, habits, and environment to promote lasting vitality.
functionalHealth.pillarsSubtitle: Each pillar is an essential piece of your well-being puzzle.

movement.description: Physical activity adapted to your reality and life stage.
movement.benefit: More strength, mobility, and confidence in daily life.

assessment.metaDescription: Take a quick self-assessment of your sleep, nutrition, energy, and stress. Get personalized guidance.
assessment.title: Health Self-Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Answer honestly. It takes less than 2 minutes.
assessment.resultExcellent: Congratulations! You're on a good path. Professional guidance can help optimize your results even further.
assessment.resultGood: You have a solid foundation, but there's room for improvement. Let's talk about how to boost your well-being.
assessment.resultFair: Some pillars of your health need attention. Schedule a conversation — together we can create a personalized plan.
assessment.resultPoor: Your health deserves care now. Don't wait — schedule an assessment and take the first step toward better quality of life.
assessment.consent: I agree to the use of my data according to the Privacy Policy.

privacy.metaDescription: Michel Eduardo Privacy Policy. Learn how your data is collected, used, and protected.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This Privacy Policy describes how Michel Eduardo collects, uses, and protects your personal data, in compliance with LGPD and Canadian data protection laws (PIPEDA). We collect only data necessary for contact and service delivery. You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time via the contact email.
